# A. Michael Wright

Official site: https://amichaelwright.com

Author: A. Michael Wright

Primary series: The Wellspring Saga

Genre: Epic dark fantasy, mythic fantasy

Books:

- Book 1: The Shattered Pact
  - Status: Available now
  - Amazon: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0GXPLPBRY
  - Excerpt: https://amichaelwright.com/excerpt
  - Description: Book One of The Wellspring Saga, an epic dark fantasy about one impossible survivor and a world beginning to break.

- Book 2: The Fracture of Worlds
  - Status: Available now
  - Amazon: https://a.co/d/08fIgLrx
  - Excerpt: https://amichaelwright.com/excerpt/book-2
  - Description: Book Two of The Wellspring Saga, continuing the mythic dark fantasy saga begun in The Shattered Pact.

Reading order:

1. The Shattered Pact
2. The Fracture of Worlds

Newsletter:

Readers can join the newsletter at https://amichaelwright.com/#signup for Book 3 news, release updates, bonus lore, and behind-the-scenes notes.
